description_long: This rifle features a robust, matte-black metal body with a cylindrical barrel and a fixed stock. A prominent under-barrel attachment, likely a gas canister or grenade launcher, is mounted beneath the main barrel, giving the weapon a distinctive, tactical appearance. The grip and trigger assembly are ergonomically shaped, and the magazine appears integrated or internal, with no visible detachable box. The surface is mostly smooth with some subtle wear and metallic highlights, suggesting frequent handling. The rifle is equipped with basic iron sights, and the muzzle is plain, lacking any visible suppressor or flash hider. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A matte-black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, under-barrel canister, and iron sights, featuring a robust and utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, under-barrel canister, and aligned iron sights.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the rifle, fixed stock, under-barrel canister, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, rear sight, and the alignment of the barrel and canister.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's profile, under-barrel canister, and overall structure.
